title: Fix checkout 500 after coupon removal
body: Removing a coupon during checkout can leave the order total in an invalid state and returns HTTP 500.
acceptance_criteria: Removing the final coupon does not return HTTP 500
Order totals are recalculated before payment authorization

fields.description: Review infrastructure state access after the platform account split.

acceptance_criteria: State backends and IAM policies are reviewed

title: Add prompt telemetry
description: Capture prompt version, model, and eval outcome for LLM requests.
acceptance_criteria: Prompt version is attached to each request
Eval outcome is queryable from dashboard
